title: Epic Lands
description: Epic Terrain generation with shaders to enjoy the beauty of Minecraft
body:
![Exemple : render distance at 300](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e668c25a2b8f2ef6d4e0c762968bdd0b8aff520e.png)

---
Welcome to **Epic Lands**, a hyper-realistic terrain generation modpack designed for smooth gameplay.  



This modpack is based on the mod [**Epic Terrain**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/epicterrain).  



I made this for people who love ultra realistic landscapes and beautiful world generation, with high-resolution textures and good shaders. It's also great for video creators looking to make visually impressive Minecraft content.  


The mods, texture packs, and shaders used in this modpack are very **resource-intensive** and won't run well on budget or low-end systems. I have a **Ryzen 9 5900X** and an **RTX 3060**, and while the game runs well, terrain generation with **Distant Horizons** can be slow at high render distances.  


I made the map that i generated pulic so you can see what it looks like. Download [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1VqEhBbz7Z47Kkm9HSVdFegZYQ-l40m1R/view?usp=sharing)


To enhance the experience further, I recommend getting the **best-looking texture pack** from [**Hodilton**](https://www.patreon.com/c/hodi/home).  
For shaders, sadly [**SEUS PTGI E12**](https://www.patreon.com/file?h=32990443&m=51027061) (free), is not compatible with Distant Horizon, but Bliss or Complementary are still decent.


**If you have a bug, [join the discord](https://discord.gg/Fxq7EmvUh3), accept the rules and go to Help, then send a message with your problem and ping @amilex**
